クラス CombatSimulator

java.lang.Object
simulation.CombatSimulator
public class CombatSimulator extends Object
Coordinates the time-based combat simulation and delegates focused runtime work to helper collaborators.

  • ネストされたクラスの概要

    ネストされたクラス
    修飾子とタイプ
    クラス
    説明
    static enum 
    CombatSimulator.Moonsign
    Represents the global Moonsign state of the party.
    static interface 
    CombatSimulator.ReactionListener
    Observer interface for elemental reaction events.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • CombatSimulator

      public CombatSimulator()
      Constructs a simulator with default runtime collaborators.

    • CombatSimulator

      public CombatSimulator(DamageTracker damageTracker, SimulationEventBus eventBus, CombatLogSink combatLogSink)
      Constructs a simulator with injected reporting and event dependencies.
      パラメータ:
      damageTracker - damage recorder and report formatter
      eventBus - action, particle, and reaction dispatcher
      combatLogSink - combat timeline sink

  • メソッドの詳細

    • setLoggingEnabled

      public void setLoggingEnabled(boolean enable)
      Enables or disables per-action console logging.
      パラメータ:
      enable - true to enable logging

    • isLoggingEnabled

      public boolean isLoggingEnabled()
      Returns whether console logging is enabled.
      戻り値:
      true if enabled

    • setEnemy

      public void setEnemy(Enemy enemy)
      Sets the enemy used in the current simulation.
      パラメータ:
      enemy - target enemy

    • getEnemy

      public Enemy getEnemy()
      Returns the current enemy.
      戻り値:
      configured enemy, or null

    • addCharacter

      public void addCharacter(Character character)
      Adds a character to the party and initializes rotation energy state.
      パラメータ:
      character - character to add

    • getCharacter

      public Character getCharacter(String name)
      Returns a party member by name.
      パラメータ:
      name - character name
      戻り値:
      matching character, or null

    • getCharacter

      public Character getCharacter(CharacterId id)

    • getPartyMembers

      public Collection<Character> getPartyMembers()
      Returns all party members.
      戻り値:
      party members

    • getActiveCharacter

      public Character getActiveCharacter()
      Returns the active character.
      戻り値:
      active character, or null

    • switchCharacter

      public void switchCharacter(String name)
      Executes a standard character swap with cooldown and callbacks.
      パラメータ:
      name - target character name

    • switchCharacter

      public void switchCharacter(CharacterId id)

    • setActiveCharacter

      public void setActiveCharacter(String name)
      Directly sets the active character without swap side effects.
      パラメータ:
      name - target character name

    • setActiveCharacter

      public void setActiveCharacter(CharacterId id)

    • getCurrentTime

      public double getCurrentTime()
      Returns the current simulation time.
      戻り値:
      current time in seconds

      Adds a team buff.

      Adds a non-stacking team buff.

      Adds an active-character-only field buff.
      パラメータ:

    • getApplicableBuffs

      public List<Buff> getApplicableBuffs(Character character)
      Returns buffs applicable to the given character.
      パラメータ:
      character - character being evaluated
      戻り値:
      applicable buff list

    • setMoonsign

      public void setMoonsign(CombatSimulator.Moonsign sign)
      Directly sets the Moonsign state.
      パラメータ:
      sign - new moonsign state

    • getMoonsign

      public CombatSimulator.Moonsign getMoonsign()
      Returns the current Moonsign state.
      戻り値:
      current moonsign

    • getTeamBuffs

      public List<Buff> getTeamBuffs()
      Returns buffs currently applicable to the active character.
      戻り値:
      active-character buff list

      request - typed action request

      Returns the tracked rotation duration.

      Explicitly updates the tracked rotation time.

      rotationTime - new rotation time in seconds

      Prints a DPS summary report.

      public double getDPS()
      Returns total DPS over the recorded rotation time.
      戻り値:
      DPS value

    • getTotalDamage

      public double getTotalDamage()
      Returns total accumulated damage.
      戻り値:
      total damage

    • getDamageByCharacter

      public double getDamageByCharacter(CharacterId id)
      Returns the accumulated damage attributed to a specific character.
      パラメータ:
      id - character whose damage to query
      戻り値:
      damage total for that character, or 0.0 if not found

      Registers a timer event.
      パラメータ:
      event - event to register

      Advances simulation time and ticks due events.
      パラメータ:
      duration - duration to advance in seconds

      Adds a reaction listener.
      パラメータ:
      listener - listener to register

      public void notifyReaction(ReactionResult result, Character trigger)
      Dispatches a reaction event and artifact reaction hooks.

      result - reaction result
      trigger - triggering character

      Recomputes party-wide Gleaming Moon synergy.

      action - action to resolve

      buffer - the character whose stats determine the granted Lunar bonus

    • setECTimerRunning

      public void setECTimerRunning(boolean running)
      Compatibility wrapper retained for existing reaction helpers. Sets the EC timer running flag.
      パラメータ:
      running - new EC timer state

    • isECTimerRunning

      public boolean isECTimerRunning()
      Compatibility wrapper retained for existing reaction helpers. Returns whether an EC-related timer is active.
      戻り値:
      true if active

    • isThundercloudActive

      public boolean isThundercloudActive()
      Compatibility wrapper retained for existing reaction helpers. Returns whether Thundercloud is active at the current time.
      戻り値:
      true if active

    • getThundercloudEndTime

      public double getThundercloudEndTime()
      Compatibility wrapper retained for existing reaction helpers. Returns the Thundercloud expiry time.
      戻り値:
      expiry time in seconds

    • setThundercloudEndTime

      public void setThundercloudEndTime(double endTime)
      Compatibility wrapper retained for existing reaction helpers. Sets the Thundercloud expiry time.
      パラメータ:
      endTime - expiry time in seconds
